title: get_health_check_status
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/health returns 200 with success true and a service message when the API is running normally.

title: post_user_registration_with_valid_data
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/register with valid full_name, username, email, password, and password_confirmation returns 201 with user data and a Sanctum token.

title: post_user_registration_with_invalid_data
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/register with missing or invalid fields returns 422 validation error with appropriate field-level messages.

title: post_user_login_with_valid_credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid username and password returns 200 with user data and a Sanctum token.

title: post_user_login_with_invalid_credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/login with incorrect credentials returns 422 invalid credentials error and no token.

title: post_user_logout_with_valid_token
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/logout with a valid bearer token returns 200 confirming logout and subsequent access with the same token is unauthorized.

title: post_user_logout_without_token
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/logout without a token or with an expired token returns 401 unauthenticated.

title: post_forgot_password_with_registered_email
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password with a registered email returns 200 with a reset_token and message.

title: post_forgot_password_with_unregistered_email
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password with an unregistered email returns 200 with success message (security-by-obscurity, same response as registered email).

title: post_reset_password_with_valid_token
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password with valid email, token, password, and password_confirmation returns 200 with message 'Password berhasil direset.' and allows login with new password.

title: get_profile_with_valid_token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/profile with a valid bearer token returns 200 with authenticated user profile data (full_name, username, email, profile_photo_url).

title: patch_profile_with_valid_data
description: Verify that PATCH /api/v1/profile with valid full_name, username, and email returns 200 confirming profile update and reflects changes in database.

title: patch_profile_with_duplicate_username
description: Verify that PATCH /api/v1/profile with an existing username returns 422 validation error with field-level message for username.

title: patch_profile_with_duplicate_email
description: Verify that PATCH /api/v1/profile with an existing email returns 422 validation error with field-level message for email.

title: post_profile_photo_with_valid_image
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/profile/photo with a valid image file returns 200 confirming photo upload and updates user profile_photo_path.

title: post_profile_photo_with_non_image
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/profile/photo with a non-image file (e.g. PDF) returns 422 validation error for the photo field.
